IT_END_TO_END.description: Foundational IT knowledge spanning infrastructure through platform operations

networking.description: Network protocols, topologies, DNS, load balancing, CDN

operating_systems.description: OS concepts, process management, file systems, kernel

storage_fundamentals.description: Block, object, file storage, replication, durability

architecture_design.description: System design, microservices, monolith, DDD, CQRS

apis_integrations.description: REST, GraphQL, gRPC, webhooks, API versioning

ci_cd_devops.description: Build pipelines, deployment strategies, GitOps, IaC

testing_qa.description: Unit, integration, E2E, property-based, mutation testing

observability_sre.description: Metrics, logging, tracing, SLOs, incident response

databases.description: SQL, NoSQL, indexing, query optimization, migrations

search_retrieval.description: Full-text search, Elasticsearch, vector search, ranking

cloud_fundamentals.description: Cloud services, regions, networking, managed services

identity_access_management.description: IAM, RBAC, ABAC, OAuth, SAML, SSO

release_management.description: Versioning, release trains, feature flags, rollback

finops_cost.description: Cloud cost optimization, budgets, tagging, reserved instances

healthcare.description: Healthcare IT: EHR, claims, HIPAA, HL7/FHIR

finance.description: Financial services: payments, KYC/AML, PCI-DSS, trading

rust.description: Rust core, web frameworks, safety patterns
